detailed_description: This video provides a first-person perspective of an individual cooking a meal alone in a clean, modern kitchen. The scene highlights the routine and self-sufficient aspect of independent living, showing the person actively stirring food in a pan and managing a pot on the stove. It captures the simple, everyday process of preparing one's own food, embodying the quiet moments of living solo.

segments.why_kept: This entire segment perfectly captures the core meaning and hero moment of the video, which is the continuous process of cooking alone, as indicated by the 'pov: you live alone' text. The action starts immediately and continues throughout, without any setup or dead air, clearly demonstrating the 'Process/Labor' aspect.
